description: Blighted land where something went deeply wrong and the earth itself seems to suffer, warning away all who approach.
biomes: Grey soil where nothing grows right. The plants that survive are twisted and pale, and the animals have too many eyes.
A hollow place where spells unravel and enchantments go silent. The air feels flat and empty, like something vital was drained away.
Trees bent into spirals and knots by some unseen force. The bark splits in patterns that almost look like faces.
White fragments scattered across dark earth as far as you can see. The ground crunches with every step and the wind moans low.
Dark water that does not reflect the sky. The reeds are black and the fog moves against the wind.
Cracked earth and dead grass under a sky that never quite clears. A faint wrongness hangs in the air like a taste you cannot name.
A creeping stain on the land where the soil turns black and the plants wilt in a slow, spreading circle. The edge moves closer each day.
